AddDialog.CustomTorrentTitleHelperText: Write custom title to find poster
AddDialog.HashExists: This torrent is already in database
AddDialog.SaveToDbHint: Turn off to stream once without keeping the torrent in the database.

AuthRequiredHint: This server uses HTTP Basic Auth. Sign in with the form, or configure users in accs.db next to the TorrServer binary.
LoginSubtitle: Sign in to manage your library
BufferNote: Set Preload Cache Before Play > 32 MB in settings to change preload size
CloseServer?: Do you want to turn off server?
ExternalPlayersHint: Open in VLC, Infuse, etc. — enable in Settings → App
Name: Name

PWAGuide.Description: Install the app on your device to easily access it anytime. No AppStore. No download.
PWAGuide.PlayerButtons: VLC, Infuse, SenPlayer, IINA buttons can be added to open video instantly in these players. You can also use the built-in player.
PWAGuide.AndroidDescription: Add TorrServer to your home screen for quick access. No store download required.

SettingsDialog.CacheAfterReaderDesc: from cache will be loaded after currently played frame
SettingsDialog.CacheBeforeReaderDesc: from cache will be saved before currently played frame
SettingsDialog.DisableDHTHint: Disable if there is no network after starting the server
SettingsDialog.DisableUTPHint: Recommended to disable in Windows OS
SettingsDialog.EnableLPDHint: LPD allows devices on the same home network to find each other and share torrent files directly
SettingsDialog.EnableLPDIPv6Hint: Enable only if supported by ISP
SettingsDialog.BonjourHint: Advertise on the LAN for local discovery (mDNS)
SettingsDialog.EnableDebugHint: For developers. Don`t enable without need.
SettingsDialog.EnableIPv6Hint: Enable only if supported by ISP
SettingsDialog.EnableRutorSearch: Turn on torrents search by RuTor
SettingsDialog.EnableRutorSearchHint: You can search torrents by RuTor, even if the RuTor is not available. NOTE: The database takes about 500 MB of RAM.
SettingsDialog.ForceEncryptHint: Can help with torrent blocking providers
SettingsDialog.PosterPlayActionHint: What Play does on library posters and in torrent details. External players appear here after you enable them above. On iPhone/iPad, Copy link is the default because the built-in player is limited.
SettingsDialog.TorrsProtocolHint: Installed Chrome/Edge app can open magnet: and torrs:// links (allow the protocol when prompted). Safari: paste the link into Add.
SettingsDialog.RemoveCacheOnDrop: Remove Cache from Disk on Drop Torrent
SettingsDialog.RemoveCacheOnDropDesc: If disabled, cache removed on delete torrent.
SettingsDialog.ResponsiveModeHint: Read torrent data as soon as possible for better streaming experience
SettingsDialog.RetrackersModeHint: Trackers modification mode when adding a new torrent
SettingsDialog.SettingsStorageHint: JSON is easier to edit/backup, BBolt is more robust.
SettingsDialog.ShowFSActiveTorr: Show only active torrents in the file system
SettingsDialog.ShowFSActiveTorrHint: When enabled, only active torrents are shown in the FS (FUSE, WebDAV, etc.). If disabled, all torrents will be displayed, which may cause simultaneous connections to all torrents when opening a category and slowdown.
SettingsDialog.StorageSettingsSaved: Settings saved! Restart application for changes to take effect.
SettingsDialog.UseDiskDesc: Better use RAM or external storage on flash-based devices
SettingsDialog.UseInfuse: Prompt to open video in Infuse
SettingsDialog.UseInfuseHint: Add Infuse player button to torrent content list
SettingsDialog.UseSenPlayer: Prompt to open video in SenPlayer
SettingsDialog.UseSenPlayerHint: Add SenPlayer button to torrent content list
SettingsDialog.UseVLC: Prompt to open video in VLC
SettingsDialog.UseVLCHint: Add VLC player button to torrent content list
SettingsDialog.UseIINA: Prompt to open video in IINA
SettingsDialog.UseIINAHint: Add IINA player button to torrent content list (macOS only)
SettingsDialog.ViewedStorageHint: Choose where to store viewed history
SettingsDialog.AppTabHint: Player buttons save instantly in this browser. TMDB settings apply after Save (may restart the server).
SettingsDialog.MobileAppInstantHint: These toggles save immediately in this browser — Save is not required.
SettingsDialog.StorageSettingsApplyHint: Backend changes apply after Save. Restart may be required for some migrations.
SettingsDialog.TrackTimecodeHint: Store resume timecodes in viewed history.
SettingsDialog.AppearanceInstantHint: Theme and palette apply immediately in this browser — Save is not required.
SettingsDialog.DialogsInstantHint: These options apply immediately in this browser — Save is not required.
SettingsDialog.DialogsFullScreenHint: Details, Settings, Search, and other sheets open edge-to-edge even on wide screens.

ThanksToEveryone: Thanks to everyone who tested and helped!

Torznab.EnableSearchViaTorznab: Enable search via Torznab indexers (e.g. Jackett, Prowlarr)
Torznab.HostHint: Jackett: …/indexers/all/results/torznab/ — Prowlarr: http://localhost:9696/1. TorrServer appends /api when needed.
Torznab.NoIndexersConfigured: Torznab is enabled but no indexers are configured. Add a Host URL and API key below.
Torznab.NoSearchSources: No search sources enabled. Turn on RuTor and/or Torznab in Settings → Search.

GStreamer.SaveHint: Changes apply when you press Save.
GStreamer.VersionHint: Detected automatically. Set it manually only if detection is incorrect. Minimum: 1.22.
GStreamer.PathHint: Path to GStreamer installation. Leave empty for auto-detection.
GStreamer.SourceHint: stream opens any info hash; play requires the torrent to be added first.
GStreamer.MaxTasksHint: 0 means unlimited; the least recently active task is removed when the limit is exceeded.
GStreamer.InactiveMinutesHint: Releases an idle pipeline; the next request starts it again.
GStreamer.AACBitrateKbpsHint: Used only for non-AAC audio; doubled when more than two channels are selected.
GStreamer.AACChannelsHint: 0 uses the source track (1-8 channels); fallback is 2.
GStreamer.AACSamplerateHint: 0 selects the nearest supported source rate; fallback is 48000 Hz.
GStreamer.SegmentSecondsHint: Target HLS segment duration; copy mode uses file Cue boundaries when available.
GStreamer.SegmentDiffHint: Copy-mode keyframe alignment tolerance; 0 disables the limit. Usually leave unchanged.
GStreamer.VideoBitrateHint: Used only when video transcoding to H.264 is enabled.
GStreamer.TranscodeHint: Off copies video without quality loss; on converts it to H.264 using CPU/GPU.
GStreamer.HDRToSDRHint: Tone-map PQ/HLG video and transcode it to SDR H.264.
GStreamer.SubtitlesHint: Convert supported embedded text subtitles to segmented WebVTT.
GStreamer.UseGPUHint: Allows GPU encoding and HDR tone mapping; falls back to CPU when unavailable.
GStreamer.HardwareAccelerationHint: Tests supported GPU encoders once and falls back to x264 when none works.
GStreamer.X264UltrafastHint: Reduces CPU load at the cost of quality for the same bitrate.

TMDB.APIKeyHint: Enter your TMDB API key to enable movie poster search. Get one at https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api
TMDB.APIURLHint: Base URL for TMDB API. API paths are added automatically (default: https://api.themoviedb.org)
TMDB.ImageURLHint: Base URL for TMDB images. Image paths are added automatically (default: https://image.tmdb.org)
TMDB.ImageURLRuHint: Alternative image URL for Russian users. Image paths are added automatically (default: https://imagetmdb.com)

NoPlayableFiles: No playable files in this torrent
ConfirmCloseServer: This stops the server and interrupts any active streams.
ConfirmDeleteTorrent: Delete this torrent and remove it from the database? This can't be undone.
ConfirmRemoveAll: This permanently deletes every torrent from the database. This can't be undone.
ConfirmRemoveViews: Clear all viewed markers for this torrent?
StorageLoadFailed: Storage backends could not be loaded. Other settings can still be saved.
ImportLibraryHint: Paste export JSON, magnets, or torrs:// links (one per line), or load a file.
ImportLibrarySkipExisting: Skip torrents already in the library
ExportDownloadHint: If paste is empty (common on http://LAN), download a file instead:
ExportCopyFailed: Could not copy — use download or select the text below
StorageRestartHint: Changing storage backends requires a TorrServer restart to take effect.
PwaUpdateFailed: Could not update the offline cache. Hard-reload or clear site data if the UI looks stuck.
